channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Over 150 injured, 11 seriously, in Iranian missile strikes on southern cities of Arad, Dimona - The Times of Israel
item.description:
1. Over 150 injured, 11 seriously, in Iranian missile strikes on southern cities of Arad, Dimona  The Times of Israel
  2. No injuries reported after third Iranian missile attack this morning  The Times of Israel
  3. Iran attacks near Israeli nuclear site, fires long-range missiles for first time  Reuters
  4. Iran strikes near Israeli nuclear research center as Trump threatens attacks on Iranian power plants  Politico
  5. 2 Iranian strikes on towns near Israel's main nuclear research center injure more than 100 people  CBS News

item.title: Middle East crisis live: Trump gives Iran 48-hour ultimatum to open strait of Hormuz; about 100 injured in Israel - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Middle East crisis live: Trump gives Iran 48-hour ultimatum to open strait of Hormuz; about 100 injured in Israel  The Guardian
  2. Trump gives Iran 48 hours on Hormuz, threatens power plants  The Boston Globe
  3. Live Updates: More than 100 wounded in Iranian strikes on Israel, Trump threatens to "obliterate" Iran's power plants  CBS News
  4. A Look at the Escalating Battle for the Strait of Hormuz  The New York Times
  5. Iran War Live: Trump Threatens to Hit Iran’s Power Plants if Hormuz Isn’t Reopened in 48 Hours  WSJ

item.title: Japan Says Not Considering Unilateral Talks With Iran on Hormuz - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. Japan Says Not Considering Unilateral Talks With Iran on Hormuz  Bloomberg.com

  4. G7 ready to act to protect global energy supplies, backs Hormuz Strait security  Reuters

item.title: Iran launched missiles at US-UK military base in the Indian Ocean. Here’s what that says about its capabilities - CNN
item.description:
1. Iran launched missiles at US-UK military base in the Indian Ocean. Here’s what that says about its capabilities  CNN

  4. Iran Brings Europe Into Range With Missiles Fired at Diego Garcia  WSJ
  5. Iran fires missiles at remote U.K.-U.S. base, claiming long-range capabilities it previously denied  NBC News

  4. Italy’s justice referendum becomes a high stakes test for conservative Premier Giorgia Meloni  The Hill

item.title: Iran war's economic shocks could reverberate for a while - Axios

item.title: In Cuba, a 'Solidarity Caravan' Has Arrived - Newser
item.description:

item.title: All Iranian officials and commanders killed in the past nine months - Euronews.com

item.title: Trump's mixed messages on Iran: 'Winding down' the war and easing sanctions but adding more troops - AP News
item.description:

item.title: Iran threatens US, Israeli infrastructure over energy strikes - The Jerusalem Post

item.title: The Strait of Hormuz is the fourth large supply shock this decade. Welcome to the new era of global disorder - Fortune
item.description:

item.title: Iran says Natanz nuclear site was hit in US-Israeli attack - Euronews.com

item.title: Trump Signals Retreat From Goal of Regime Change in Iran - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Trump Signals Retreat From Goal of Regime Change in Iran  The New York Times

  4. Trump says he doesn't want Iran war ceasefire, but is considering 'winding down' military ops  CNBC
